title: Nevada Disability Adjudicator Rates (BLOCKED — NV HR JS-only page pending)

Notable context: AFSCME Local 4041 (NSEA) Unit C CBA was ratified August 2024 — the newest DDS CBA in the country, enabled by NV AB 271 (2019).
